topic: uncertainty estimation for reliable medical image classification

scope_classification.label: local_experiment
scope_classification.rationale: The topic can be explored with small simulations, synthetic data, or lightweight local experiments on the Mac.
scope_classification.feasibility_note: Yes, this research topic is highly feasible on a MacBook M4, as the 36GB of RAM and powerful MPS GPU are well-suited for training common deep learning models like ResNets or Vision Transformers on medical datasets. Suitable public datasets include CheXpert for chest X-ray classification, the ISIC Archive for skin lesion analysis, and the BraTS dataset for 3D brain tumor segmentation. Experiment time will vary, but training a standard model on a 2D dataset like CheXpert could take under an hour,

parsed_papers.title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
parsed_papers.core_claim: The AI Scientist generates novel research ideas, writes code, executes experiments, visualizes results, describes its findings by writing a full scientific paper, and then runs a simulated review process for evaluation.
method_or_focus: The integration of a complete automated scientific workflow from idea generation to paper writing and evaluation, including an automated reviewer that achieves near-human performance.
parsed_papers.best_result: Papers that exceed the acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference as judged by the automated reviewer
parsed_papers.possible_gap: Based on full paper reading: The integration of a complete automated scientific workflow from idea generation to paper writing and evaluation, including an automated reviewer that achieves near-human performance.

deep_read.method_summary: The AI Scientist generates novel research ideas, writes code, executes experiments, visualizes results, describes its findings by writing a full scientific paper, and then runs a simulated review process for evaluation.
deep_read.key_innovation: The integration of a complete automated scientific workflow from idea generation to paper writing and evaluation, including an automated reviewer that achieves near-human performance.
deep_read.best_result: Papers that exceed the acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference as judged by the automated reviewer
deep_read.title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery

parsed_papers.title: Agent Laboratory: Using LLM Agents as Research Assistants
parsed_papers.core_claim: A framework that accepts human research ideas and progresses through literature review, experimentation, and report writing stages, producing code repositories and research reports with user feedback at each stage.
method_or_focus: Using LLM agents as autonomous research assistants that can complete the entire research process from idea to final paper.

key_results.cost_reduction: 84% decrease compared to previous autonomous research methods
key_results.human_feedback_impact: significantly improves overall quality of research

parsed_papers.best_result: 84% decrease in research expenses compared to previous autonomous research methods
parsed_papers.possible_gap: Based on full paper reading: Using LLM agents as autonomous research assistants that can complete the entire research process from idea to final paper.

parsed_papers.title: MLE-bench: Evaluating Machine Learning Agents on Machine Learning Engineering
parsed_papers.core_claim: Created MLE-bench benchmark using real-world ML engineering tasks from Kaggle competitions, evaluated frontier language models with open-source agent scaffolds against human baselines from Kaggle leaderboards.
method_or_focus: MLE-bench benchmark for evaluating ML engineering capabilities of AI agents on real-world tasks
baselines_compared: other frontier language models with various scaffolds
parsed_papers.best_result: OpenAI's o1-preview with AIDE scaffolding achieves at least Kaggle bronze medal level in 16.9% of competitions
parsed_papers.possible_gap: Based on full paper reading: MLE-bench benchmark for evaluating ML engineering capabilities of AI agents on real-world tasks
